prompt_used: This is Villain. Each snowfall uncovers one body and one impossible alibi. Work the case in order: secure dispatch freeze frame, confirm the scene at mountain logging town under blizzard lockdown, and do not let The White Knife choose the pace. Trust the evidence before you trust the performance.
source_prompt: Story: Red Creek Winter (red-creek-winter) | Hook: Each snowfall uncovers one body and one impossible alibi. | Subgenre: small-town slasher mystery | Tone: INTENSE | Location: Mountain logging town under blizzard lockdown | Villain: The White Knife | Villain worldview: Fear is the only honest truth in a town built on denial. | Motifs: snow lines, hunting whistles, frosted glass.
